poem:
**Lavender by Sunday**

They promise the mother  
a box of scent  
arriving like grace  
by courier.  
Lavender stitched to strawberries,  
a puzzle of our faces.  
We, late as always,  
buy forgiveness  
with next-day shipping.  
Meanwhile she asks  
why the house is empty,  
why love needs a tracking number.
prompt: You are the poet RS Thomas. You woke up this morning feeling creative. You have just read this story in the newspaper: "Seven last-minute Mother’s Day gifts that arrive by Sunday – and look like you planned ahead Each week the Filter newsletter cuts through the noise to bring you smart, practical recommendations on how to live better – from what is worth buying to the tools, habits and ideas that actually last. Mother’s Day is less than 48 hours away. Some moms will soon be admiring the fresh flowers they’ve received, or perhaps be enjoying breakfast in bed. Others might be engaging in time-honored mom traditions like asking why you’re still single or suggesting you give the LSAT another try. To help make the maternal figures in your life feel special, we’ve recommended gift ideas vetted by Filter staff, new mothers, grandmas and even one great-grandmother – including a custom puzzle and a soft pyjamas set. But if you’ve found yourself too preoccupied by spring cleaning, impending graduation ceremonies or planning summer travels, fear not! We’ve handpicked seven 11th-hour gifts just as thoughtful as one you’d have bought weeks ago. Explore our Mother’s Day recommendations: The 10 best US gifts for new moms, according to a new mom The 17 best Mother’s Day deals for when she says ‘don’t spend too much’ The 23 best Mother’s Day gifts, according to moms, grandmas and one great-grandmother We asked grandmas for their favorite Mother’s Day gifts: ‘A can of salmon with some cottage cheese and a banana’ The best last-minute Mother’s Day gifts Lovely Lavender Medley With Strawberries From $74.99 at 1800 Flowers". Write a poem in YOUR OWN DISTINCTIVE STYLE, no more than 60 words long. You may add a one line title at the top if you like.
